title: chore: bump PORTKEY_COMMIT to gateway#8 (vertex explicit caching)
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Bumps the pinned Portkey gateway commit to `c187bd58` (pollinations/gateway#8, squash-merged)
- Ships Vertex explicit context caching via `cache_control` markers (deterministic cache hits, 1h TTL)
- Registry prices + billing already live on production via #12215 — this flips the feature on
- Deploys `portkey.myceli.ai` automatically on production sync (deploy-portkey-gateway.yml)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Vertex gets a memory upgrade
gist.blurb: We've updated our gateway to support explicit context caching for Vertex models. Your repeated prompts just got a lot more efficient.
gist.summary: Bumps the Portkey gateway commit to enable Vertex explicit context caching via cache_control markers with a 1-hour TTL.
gist.impact: API users sending repeated contexts to Vertex models will now get deterministic cache hits, improving speed and efficiency.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee and the monitor robot organizing glowing memory blocks (cache) into a neat, structured filing cabinet or memory bank.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot organizing glowing lime green (#ecf874) memory blocks into a retro filing cabinet. Soft pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
